nodes.name: 皮欽查省
nodes.summary: 皮欽查省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括Baudo guan、齿嘴蜂鸟、蓝头红嘴蜂鸟等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 原始森林
nodes.summary: 原始森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联240种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、Singing quail、Stripe-faced wood quail等240种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Chocó vireo
nodes.summary: Chocó vireo（Chocó vireo，学名 Vireo masteri），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于皮欽查省、原始森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Choco vireo is a bird of the Chocó region, which is famed for its high biological diversity. As of 2023 it was known from only four locations between Colombia's Alto de Pisiones in the north and near La Delicia, Pichincha Province, Ecuador in the south. Searches between those areas have not found the species. The Choco vireo primarily inhabits the interior and edges of primary rainforest on both level ground and on steep slopes

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Choco vireo is a bird of the Chocó region, which is famed for its high biological diversity. As of 2023 it was known from only four locations between Colombia's Alto de Pisiones in the north and near La Delicia, Pichincha Province, Ecuador in the south. Searches between those areas have not found the species. The Choco vireo primarily inhabits the interior and edges of primary rainforest on both level ground and on steep slopes

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The range and population of Choco Vireo are in decline as a consequence of habitat destruction" by clearing for timber, agriculture, mining, and human habitation
